# ExpCurve — XP required to reach the NEXT level

# Levels 1–100. Smooth early game, ramps after 50 so 100 feels like an achievement.

# Format: LV=XP\_TO\_NEXT

1=20
2=25
3=35
4=50
5=70
6=95
7=125
8=160
9=200
10=245
11=295
12=350
13=410
14=475
15=545
16=620
17=700
18=785
19=875
20=970
21=1070
22=1175
23=1285
24=1400
25=1520
26=1645
27=1775
28=1910
29=2050
30=2195
31=2345
32=2500
33=2660
34=2825
35=2995
36=3170
37=3350
38=3535
39=3725
40=3920
41=4120
42=4325
43=4535
44=4750
45=4970
46=5195
47=5425
48=5660
49=5900
50=6150

# Post-50 ramp: larger steps each level

51=6400
52=6700
53=7050
54=7450
55=7900
56=8400
57=8950
58=9550
59=10200
60=10900
61=11650
62=12450
63=13300
64=14200
65=15150
66=16150
67=17200
68=18300
69=19450
70=20650
71=21900
72=23200
73=24550
74=25950
75=27400
76=28900
77=30450
78=32050
79=33700
80=35400
81=37150
82=38950
83=40800
84=42700
85=44650
86=46650
87=48700
88=50800
89=52950
90=55150
91=57400
92=59700
93=62050
94=64450
95=66900
96=69400
97=71950
98=74550
99=77200
100=0

# Note: last line (100=0) is optional; XP\_Core should treat top level as cap.
